titleStmt.title: SII 28.124: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 124. (A.R. No. 279 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, south wall.

Records a royal order conveyed through the agency of Pallavarāyaṉ authorising the utilisation of the balance of iṟai, after deducting the paddy appropriable on the village account, (ūroṭṭu-ppaḍiyāl-uḷḷa) on the land granted by a brāhmin named [Vaindra]nāthan Varadarajā-bhaṭṭaṉ sarvvakratukkaḷ as the maintenance of the several funtionaries (paḷa-paṇinimandakkāṟar) serving the deity Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār, set up by the same brāhmin, who was a resident of Koṟṟaṅguḍi alias Pavattiramāṇikka-nallūr, a hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr. The land concerned amounting to 1(1/4) fractions of a vēli which was granted by the brāhmin as tirunāmattukkāṇi was partly obtained by him as gift (dāna) and partly purchased by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟiraṇṭiṉāl pallavarāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārum tillaināyakaṉ perumpaṇṭārat
tārum tirukkākakkaḷḷi paṇṭārattārum Eṇṇaip paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu perum paṟṟapuliyūrp piṭākai koṟṟaṅkuṭiyāṉa pavuttira māṇikkanallūril Ulai Amutu cumappār teruvil teru [ n=tilume] mel ciṟakil kaṇṭiyūr viśvāmitra vaiyinātan varatarāja
paṭṭaṉ sarvvakratukkaḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṟkup pūcaikku Ivar dānam peṟṟum vilaikoṇṭumuṭaiyārāṉa nilamāy tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākak kuṭutta kuṇṭu pātirippāṭiyāṉa kūttāṭum nāyakaccaruppetimaṅkalattuk koḷḷiṭavāṟṟukku
vaṭakku Āḷavantāṉ Oṭaikkut teṟkup paṭṭa toṭṭikāleṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Araiyeyiraṇṭu māvum Iṅku viṭṭuk kiḻakkuc ceṭṭi ceyyeṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattu nilam muṉṟumāvum Āka nilam mukkālum pañcavaṉ māteviyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattu
veṟupiṟiṉta civakāmacuntarimaṅkalattup piṭākai Āṉantakkūttanallūril villi nampiyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭa poṇpiḷaicceyyeṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Orumāvaraiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku maṭuvaṅkaraiyil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Araimāvum Āka nilam Iraṇṭu māviṉāl virivu nilam
Araiye Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaikkiḻ mukkāle yiraṇṭu māvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe kāleyaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāle yiraṇṭu māvum mutaliyārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāyp palapaṇinimantakkāṟaṟkkuc [jī]vitam Aṭaittukkoḷḷavum Iṉṉilattukku Aṭaimutal varicaippaṭiyāluḷḷa nelli
le Ūroṭṭuppaṭiyāluḷḷa nellu nikki Iṟai mikutiyāl Uḷḷa nellukku Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭikku Ariciyum Uppum Aṭaikkāyamutum Eṇṇaiyum viṭṭu Ivar Eḻutiṉa cātaṉam tirukkai Oṭṭip paṇṭāratte Iṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku nittappaṭi nāḷ Oṉṟukku pūrikkuttal Arici
Aṟunāḻiyum pūri Uppu muvuḻakku Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku Āṟum veḷḷilaip paṟṟu Āṟumāvum Eṇṇai yuḻakkāḻākkum paṇṭāraṅkaḷ toṟum viṭavum Inta Arici viṭum Iṭattu tirukkāmakoṭṭamuṭaiya periya nācciyār koyil tirumaṭaipaḷḷi paṇṭāratte Eṭuttu viṭavum Ivar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭa nilam koyilil
palapaṇi nimantakkāṟarkku jīvitam Aṭaikkavum Ippaṭikku kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyil puṟavāyilile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate § Ippaṭi ceyapaṇṇuvate Ivai pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
